violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door reach-in refrigerator in the back storage area. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. PIC moved scoop to sanitized container at time of inspection Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the back storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
The corner beading in the dishwashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024

The wall located behind 3 bay sink on stairs leading to basement was observed to be in poor repair. Dry wall, studs and flooring need to be repaired. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to contact RIDOH-CFP to further address physical facilities and apparent mold/mildew issues. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of under ice bin at service counter, coving around dish machine/3 bay sink area and caulking between 3 bay sink and FRP. Were all observed with an accumulation of an unidentifiable black substance. Areas need to be cleaned and sanitized. Areas shall be professionally cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023

The wall located behind 3 bay sink on stairs leading to basement was observed to be in poor repair. Dry wall, studs and flooring need to be repaired. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Strong odor was detected when basement door was opened. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023
